reference: How may I help you? Hi I'm, I have been having this nasal obstruction and discharge for the past week and it doesn't seem to be going away and it's bothering me so I thought I would get it checked out by you. OK, for sure. Uhm, could you describe the discharge? Yeah, it's a. It's mostly clear, it doesn't, it doesn't have a color to it. OK, so no yellow, green or or red to indicate any blood? No. OK, and you mentioned, so with the obstruction, have you had difficulties breathing? Um a little bit, I just need to, and is mostly at night. I just need to shift to one side or the other to like unblock my airways. I see OK and have you been having any pain on your face? Like I like kind of over your cheeks or over your forehead? No. OK, how about any headaches? No headaches. All right, have you had any changes or to your sense of smell or any loss of smell? Uhm no, maybe a little bit, but no, not really. I can still eat. I can still smell like candles and things like that so, maybe go with no. OK. Have you had any changes to your sense of taste? No. OK. Have you had any eye redness or or any eye pain? No. Any ear pain or ear discharge? No. Any changes to the vision or hearing? Uh, no. OK, have you had a sore throat? No. Have you had a cough? No. Have you had any shortness of breath Uh, no. Have you had any wheezing? No. OK. And have you coughed up any blood? No. OK, and have you had any chest pain? No. Have you had any lightheadedness or dizziness? Uh, no. Have you felt like your hearts beating really fast or racing? No. OK, have you had any fevers or chills? No. Have you had a night sweats? No. Have you had any unexpected weight loss? No. OK, have you had any loss of appetite? Uh, nope. OK, have you had any nausea or vomiting? No. Have you had any abdominal pain? No. Have you had any diarrhea or constipation? No. Have you had any painful urination or urinary frequency? No. OK, have you had any skin rashes? No. Have you had any muscle aches or joint pains? No. Have you had any memory loss or confusion? No. OK, and how has your energy been? Have you had fatigue or malaise? No, nothing like that. OK. Uhm, and have you had any sneezing? No. OK. Uhm, and, uh, are you healthy? Or, or have you been diagnosed with any medical conditions in the past? No, I'm actually pretty healthy. OK. Have you had any prior surgeries or hospitalizations? Nope. OK, and any allergies like to any medications or any seasonal allergies? Like do you get symptoms like this that change throughout the year? No. OK and sorry, no allergies to medications as well? No allergies to medications. OK, and do you take any medications regularly, either prescribed or over the counter? No, I don't take any medications. OK, and can you tell me about where you're living currently and who you're living with? Uhm, I live by myself right now. I live in an apartment downtown. OK, and are you, got working right now or are you going to school or both? I'm working right now, but I'm working from home. OK, uh, have you been around anybody who's been sick? No one personally, but I do go to the grocery store and the bank and all the essential things. I see, OK. Uhm, and have you have you traveled anywhere recently? No, I haven't. OK. Are you in a relationship? I am. Are you sexually active? I am. OK, could you tell me a little bit about your partner or, or partners? Uhm yeah, so we've been together for the past five years. And yeah, he's the only sexual partner I have. OK, and do you use condoms or birth control? Birth control. OK. Uhm, and any concern for a sexually transmitted infection? No. OK and you smoke cigarettes? I don't. Do you smoke cannabis or use cannabis products? Uh, nope. OK, how about the use of any recreational drugs? No. OK, do you drink alcohol? I do, I'll have like a glass of wine every day. OK. And in the family, are there any heart conditions or lung conditions that run in the family? No. How about things like diabetes or or high blood pressure? Uhm, I don't think so. OK, and uh, are there any cancers in the family? Uhm, there's colon cancer in the family. OK, and who was that and how old were they? Uhm, my grandfather, he was 55. OK. Uhm, alright, and so that was everything that I wanted to ask today on history. Was there anything else that I was maybe forgetting? Uh, no, I think that was it. OK, so with the prominent symptoms of being nasal discharge and obstruction without fever and without, like changes to smell and also without pain, it's most likely a viral rhinosinusitis. Uhm, however, this could have symptoms that overlap with, with COVID, and so we will still end up doing a swab even though the most likely diagnosis is going to be a viral acute rhinosinusitis. OK. Do you have any other questions? No thank you or yeah, thank you. Thank you.
